|                    |                       |
|     /------+-----\-+-----------+           |
|     |  Order DB  | |           |           |
|     \------------/ |           |           |
|            ^       |           |           |
|            |       |           |           |
|            |       |           |           |
|            |       |           |           |
|            |       |     /-----+-----\     |
|            |       |     |  User DB  |     |
|            |       |     \-----------/     |
|            |       |           ^           |
|            |       |           |           |
|            |       |           |           |
|            |       |           |           |
|  Data Layer                    |           |
+---------------+----------------+-----------+
                +-+  |           |
                  |  |           |
          +----------+---------+ |
          |  Response Builder  | |
          +--------------------+ |
                  |  ^           |
                  |  |           |
                  |              |
                  |              |
                  |              |
                  |              |
+-----------------++-------------+-----------+
|                 |              |           |
|                 |              |           |
|                 |              |           |
|        +--------+--------+     |           |
|        |  Order Service  |     |           |
|        +-----------------+     |           |
|                 ^              |           |
|                 |              |           |
|                 |              |           |
|                 |              |           |
|                 |              |           |
|                 +---------+----+           |
|                           |                |
|                  +--------+-------+        |
|                  |  User Service  |        |
|                  +----------------+        |
|                           ^                |
|                           |                |
|  Service Layer            |                |
+---------------------------+----------------+
             +-------+-------+
             |  API Gateway  |
             +---------------+
